name: Lentil Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils and drain them.
2. Pour the lentils into a large pot.
3. Add the whole onions, bay leaf, thyme, and peppercorns to the pot.
4. Add boiling water to cover the contents.
5. Bring to a boil over high heat.
6. Reduce the heat to a simmer.
7. Cover and cook for 30 minutes.
8. Remove the onions, bay leaf, thyme, and peppercorns from the pot.
9. Drain any excess liquid and set aside.
10. Season with salt and pepper.
11. Mix the cooked lentils with sliced sausage and minced onion.
12. Place the mixture in a buttered casserole dish.
13. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
14. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
15. Add the flour and stir until smooth.
16. Gradually add the lentil liquid, stirring constantly until it thickens slightly.
17. Stir in the tomato catsup and pour over the lentils in the casserole dish.
18. Bake for 40 minutes.
19. Serve hot.
